# protonpass_item_identity (Data Source)

Reads a specific Proton Pass Identity item.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "protonpass_item_identity" "example" {
  item_id  = "item_id_here"
  share_id = "share_id_here"
}

output "full_name" {
  value = data.protonpass_item_identity.example.full_name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `item_id` (String) Item ID.
- `share_id` (String) Share ID of the vault.

### Read-Only

- `birthdate` (String) Birth date.
- `city` (String) City.
- `company` (String) Company.
- `country` (String) Country.
- `create_time` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `email` (String) Email.
- `first_name` (String) First name.
- `full_name` (String) Full Name.
- `gender` (String) Gender.
- `job_title` (String) Job title.
- `last_name` (String) Last name.
- `license_number` (String, Sensitive) License number.
- `middle_name` (String) Middle name.
- `modify_time` (String) Last modification timestamp.
- `organization` (String) Organization.
- `passport_number` (String, Sensitive) Passport.
- `phone_number` (String) Phone number.
- `social_security_number` (String, Sensitive) SSN.
- `street_address` (String) Street address.
- `title` (String) Title.
- `website` (String) Website.
- `work_email` (String) Work email.
- `work_phone_number` (String) Work phone.
- `zip_or_postal_code` (String) ZIP/Postal code.
